behavioral_smoke.description: End-to-end TestClient run against a production-mode app (env: ENVIRONMENT=production, ADMIN_API_KEY=real-key, APP_SECRET_KEY=48-char). Verifies the full middleware stack + handlers + exception converters produce spec-conformant responses.

GET /health (legacy endpoint).note: Legacy shape preserved — Problem only applied to /api/v1/{kb,graph,references,audit}

behavioral_smoke.non_blocking_audit_note: TestClient runs against an empty DB without the audit_log table. Audit INSERT failures printed to stderr; response shapes were unaffected — proves D4b best-effort semantics.

known_limitations.description: tests/cli/test_restore_from_cloud.py::test_restore_integration_round_trip is skipped pending a docker-compose MinIO fixture. 10/11 unit tests cover argument parsing, subprocess orchestration, and the new Railway-safety guards. Full round-trip coverage requires infra work outside this proposal's scope.
MIGRATION.md placeholder for agentic-assistant PR SHA is explicit and marked as a merge gate the PR reviewer must verify. The external consumer project has not yet been updated to the new MCP shapes.
known_limitations.merge_gate: PR description must list the agentic-assistant PR URL + merge SHA before human approval.

known_limitations.description: The OPTIONS smoke response returned 400 because ALLOWED_ORIGINS defaults to localhost-only in production mode. Real production deployment configures ALLOWED_ORIGINS via env var. Not a proposal-scope defect.

summary: All security, behavioral, and CI-parity checks pass. 195 tests green. The 3 known limitations are process/infra items appropriately deferred; one is a merge-time gate the reviewer must enforce. Ready for VAL_REVIEW.
